response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~15 years of experience, but the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows only recent, light exposure to AI/MCP tooling with no recognized AI products, platforms, or strategic advisory work. There is no evidence of the cloud/AI thought leadership, customer-facing strategy, or AI-platform building the role requires.
strengths: ~15 years of broad software engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Craftsmanship focus: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops/talks
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or AI products/platforms built
No Director/Principal-level strategic or advisory experience
Cloud experience is limited (some AWS CDK); no deep cloud-platform strategy work

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Long, broad engineering tenure with craftsmanship focus
